name: project-newman-api
description: Pipeline de tests API automatisé avec Newman

scripts.test-users: newman run collections/users_collection.json -e environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report-users.html
scripts.test-posts: newman run collections/posts_collection.json -e environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report-posts.html
scripts.test-put: newman run collections/put_collection.json -e environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report-put.html
scripts.test-patch: newman run collections/patch_collection.json -e environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report-patch.html
scripts.test-delete: newman run collections/delete_collection.json -e environment.json -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report-delete.html

author: Romaric POTON
